name: Peppermint Innovation Limited
summary: Peppermint Innovation Limited engages in the development and commercialization of mobile banking, payment, and remittance platform primarily in the Philippines. It operates Peppermint Platform, a white label mobile App banking platform and mobile App micro enterprise platform that offers payments, remittance, delivery and logistics, and ecommerce services. The company serves banks, mobile money operators, remittance companies, payment processors, retailers/merchants, credit card companies, and microfinance institutions under the Bizmoto brand. The company is based in Perth, Australia.
